findings.message:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract Exchange (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#268-412) has payable functions:
	 - Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#324-362)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
findings.name: locked-ether

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.exchange(string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#526-558):
	External calls:
	- (success,data) = exchangeContract.call(abi.encodeWithSignature(isSupported(string),targetCurrency)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#535-537)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= amount (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#540)
	Wallet.balances (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#431) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Wallet.deposit() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#482-486)
	- Wallet.exchange(string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#526-558)
	- Wallet.exchangeAUTH(string,address,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#628-666)
	- Wallet.externalTransfer(uint256,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#508-518)
	- Wallet.externalTransferAUTH(uint256,address,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#603-619)
	- Wallet.getBalance(address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#941-943)
	- Wallet.receive() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#948-951)
	- Wallet.transfer(uint256,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#493-501)
	- Wallet.transferAUTH(uint256,address,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#581-595)
	- Wallet.withdrawn(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#564-573)
	- Wallet.withdrawnAUTH(address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#673-689)
	- balances[owner] += fee (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#544)
	Wallet.balances (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#431) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Wallet.deposit() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#482-486)
	- Wallet.exchange(string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#526-558)
	- Wallet.exchangeAUTH(string,address,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#628-666)
	- Wallet.externalTransfer(uint256,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#508-518)
	- Wallet.externalTransferAUTH(uint256,address,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#603-619)
	- Wallet.getBalance(address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#941-943)
	- Wallet.receive() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#948-951)
	- Wallet.transfer(uint256,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#493-501)
	- Wallet.transferAUTH(uint256,address,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#581-595)
	- Wallet.withdrawn(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#564-573)
	- Wallet.withdrawnAUTH(address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#673-689)
findings.name: reentrancy-no-eth

findings.message:
Wallet.changeMinimumQuorum(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#840-848) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newQuorum >= 0 && newQuorum <= 100,Invalid quorum) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#841)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#922-925) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newExchangeFee >= 0 && newExchangeFee <= 100,Invalid fee) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#923)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message:
Wallet.changeOwnership(address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#931-934) should emit an event for: 
	- owner = newOwner (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#933)
findings.name: events-access

findings.message:
Wallet.updateMaximumRateDelay(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#911-916) should emit an event for: 
	- maximumRateDelay = newMaximumRateDelay (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#915)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#922-925) should emit an event for: 
	- exchangeFee = newExchangeFee (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#924)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Wallet.addOracle(string,string,string,address).accessAddress (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#799) lacks a zero-check on :
		- (success,None) = oracleContract.call(abi.encodeWithSignature(_addOracle(string,string,string,address),symbol,maintainer,url,accessAddress)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#803-811)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Wallet.exchange(string,address,uint256).targetAddress (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#528) lacks a zero-check on :
		- (success,None) = exchangeContract.call{value: exchangeAmount}(abi.encodeWithSignature(exchange(address,string,address,uint256),msg.sender,targetCurrency,targetAddress,maximumRateDelay)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#548-556)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.withdrawnAUTH(address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#673-689):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#685)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Withdrawal(from,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#688)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.externalTransferAUTH(uint256,address,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#603-619):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(to).call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#615)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(from,to,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#618)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#324-362):
	External calls:
	- (success,data) = oracleContract.call(abi.encodeWithSignature(isSupported(string),targetCurrency)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#335-337)
	- (success,data) = oracleContract.call(abi.encodeWithSignature(readRate(string),targetCurrency)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#341-343)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- ExchangeRequested(transactor,targetCurrency,msg.value,exchangeRate,block.timestamp,string.concat(bridgeURL,targetCurrency)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#354-361)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:

	Event emitted after the call(s):

findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.withdrawn(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#564-573):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(msg.sender).call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#569)

findings.message:
Oracle.answerRequest(uint256,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#125-165) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(req.active,Request not active) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#129)
	- require(bool,string)(! req.answers[msg.sender],Already answered) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#141)
	- req.requestTime < exchangeRateTime[req.currency] (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#144)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#324-362) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp - exchangeRateTimestamp <= maximumRateDelay,Exchange rate too old, request new rate) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#348-351)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version
